products.name: a2 Milk Whole Milk
products.description: Start your day off right with the deliciously smooth goodness of  a2 Milk®.  a2 Milk® Whole Milk is high-quality, real milk from cows that naturally produce ONLY the A2 protein and no A1. It is easier on digestion and published research suggests a2 Milk® may help avoid stomach discomfort in some people. Feel the a2 difference! Ultra-Pasteurized, 59 fl oz.

products.name: DairyPure Whole Milk
products.description: DairyPure whole milk is packed with the nutrients you need and the flavor you crave. Just one serving of our rich, creamy whole white milk contains 10% daily value of vitamin D and 20% daily value of calcium. Our pure, delicious, whole milk comes to you fresh and cold—and you always know where it came from, since your local dairy is right on the label. Nutritionally a good source of protein, DairyPure milk is the easy way to fit more nutrition into your day.

products.name: Alta Dena Reduced Fat Milk
products.description: Alta Dena Dairy 2% Reduced Fat Milk has 2% milk fat and is a great choice for the entire family. Wholesome and delicious, this dairy milk provides protein and calcium with vitamin D in each serving. Pour this reduced fat Alta Dena milk over your favorite cereal, add it to milkshakes or smoothies, or simply enjoy it in a glass on its own. A great option for cooking and baking, this reduced fat milk can be used in your favorite recipes. Each container holds 14 fluid ounces of 2% reduced fat milk, making it an ideal choice for individuals or smaller households. Alta Dena dairy milk reflects a commitment to the highest standard of dairy processing for over 50 years.

products.name: Horizon Organic Reduced Fat Milk
products.description: Get the joy of a cold glass of real milk with Horizon Organic High Vitamin D 2 Percent Milk. With 44% less fat than whole milk and 25% of the recommended daily value of vitamin D in every delicious serving, this organic reduced fat milk makes it super easy to get essential nutrients into your day to help support strong bones. Always USDA Certified Organic, every Horizon milk jug comes from cows cared for by trusted farmers. Plus, it comes from cows that are fed non-GMO feed and not treated with antibiotics or growth hormones.* Every 1 cup serving of this ultra-pasteurized 2% milk has 10 grams of protein and provides nutrients including calcium and vitamin A. It’s real organic milk that adults and kids can happily enjoy. At Horizon Organic, we believe that organic farming can drive healthier, more sustainable food communities for our world. Pioneering organic for the one horizon we all share. From our farmers to your family, Horizon Organic Milk is nourishing a happy, healthy future. *No significant difference has been shown between milk from rBST-treated & non rBST-treated cows. **Per National Organic Program regulations.
